title: String Duper Revived
description: Bringing back the string duper functionality from previous Minecraft versions, this mod adds a block with some additional quality of life.
body:
## Description
**Bringing back the string duper functionality from previous Minecraft versions, this mod adds a block with some additional quality of life to let players create their own string-based economy once again.**


![String Duper block example usage. Redstone powering the block and wool silencing the noise. String falls in a stream downwards.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e78ace266065488f8b937c5dc4f53bd0bf8c947_0.webp)

## Recipe and additional information

![Recipe for the block. 2 trapdoors, a lever, shears, dropper, bucket of water, 2 tripwire hooks, and a piece of string. Shaped recipe.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e8e7ae01fa9ee9cb3f11757a94030273800eabf.png)

Recipe uses any trap door type. Also note, that's a dropper in the center.

Power with a redstone signal to turn on.

Placing a piece of wool (of any normal/dyed variant) adjacent to the String Duper will silence the ticking noise we've all come to love in case it's not for you. Additionally, placing a solid block in front of the String Duper will cause it to turn off.

If you find any bugs, don't hesitate to let me know!

**Feel entirely free to use this mod in your private or public modpacks.
No need to ask for permission.**
